title: [Firtool][CAPI] Valgrind failure re: shouldDisableLayerSink
body:
There was a nightly valgrind failure here: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/12329655148/job/34414214357

Full output:

```
==3999938== Memcheck, a memory error detector
==3999938== Copyright (C) 2002-2022, and GNU GPL'd, by Julian Seward et al.
==3999938== Using Valgrind-3.21.0 and LibVEX; rerun with -h for copyright info
==3999938== Command: /home/schuylere/scratch/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build-clang-clang++-RelWithDebInfo-on-vg/bin/circt-capi-firtool-test
==3999938== 
==3999938== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==3999938==    at 0x44D666: circt::firtool::populateCHIRRTLToLowFIRRTL(mlir::PassManager&, circt::firtool::FirtoolOptions const&, llvm::StringRef) (lib/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:233)
==3999938==    by 0x408835: circtFirtoolPopulateCHIRRTLToLowFIRRTL (lib/CAPI/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:345)
==3999938==    by 0x405982: exportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:53)
==3999938==    by 0x405B02: testExportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:74)
==3999938==    by 0x405B02: main (test/CAPI/firtool.c:100)
==3999938==  Uninitialised value was created by a heap allocation
==3999938==    at 0x4C38913: operator new(unsigned long) (vg_replace_malloc.c:472)
==3999938==    by 0x4087FA: circtFirtoolOptionsCreateDefault (lib/CAPI/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:26)
==3999938==    by 0x405945: exportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:46)
==3999938==    by 0x405B02: testExportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:74)
==3999938==    by 0x405B02: main (test/CAPI/firtool.c:100)
==3999938== 
==3999938== Conditional jump or move depends on uninitialised value(s)
==3999938==    at 0x44D5F3: shouldDisableLayerSink (include/circt/Firtool/Firtool.h:99)
==3999938==    by 0x44D5F3: circt::firtool::populateCHIRRTLToLowFIRRTL(mlir::PassManager&, circt::firtool::FirtoolOptions const&, llvm::StringRef) (lib/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:233)
==3999938==    by 0x408835: circtFirtoolPopulateCHIRRTLToLowFIRRTL (lib/CAPI/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:345)
==3999938==    by 0x405982: exportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:53)
==3999938==    by 0x405B0F: testExportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:85)
==3999938==    by 0x405B0F: main (test/CAPI/firtool.c:100)
==3999938==  Uninitialised value was created by a heap allocation
==3999938==    at 0x4C38913: operator new(unsigned long) (vg_replace_malloc.c:472)
==3999938==    by 0x4087FA: circtFirtoolOptionsCreateDefault (lib/CAPI/Firtool/Firtool.cpp:26)
==3999938==    by 0x405945: exportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:46)
==3999938==    by 0x405B0F: testExportVerilog (test/CAPI/firtool.c:85)
==3999938==    by 0x405B0F: main (test/CAPI/firtool.c:100)
==3999938== 
// Generated by CIRCT firtool-1.98.0-4-g383e4aa00
module ExportTestSimpleModule(	// -:2:3
  input  [31:0] in_1,	// -:2:44
                in_2,	// -:3:44
  output [31:0] out	// -:4:45
);

  assign out = in_1 & in_2;	// -:2:3, :5:10, :6:10
endmodule

// Generated by CIRCT firtool-1.98.0-4-g383e4aa00
module ExportTestSimpleModule(	// -:2:3
  input  [31:0] in_1,	// -:2:44
                in_2,	// -:3:44
  output [31:0] out	// -:4:45
);

  assign out = in_1 & in_2 & in_2;	// -:2:3, :5:10, :6:10
endmodule

==3999938== 
==3999938== HEAP SUMMARY:
==3999938==     in use at exit: 11,035,653 bytes in 46,229 blocks
==3999938==   total heap usage: 61,614 allocs, 15,385 frees, 12,896,230 bytes allocated
==3999938== 
==3999938== LEAK SUMMARY:
==3999938==    definitely lost: 1,152 bytes in 6 blocks
==3999938==    indirectly lost: 10,566,525 bytes in 42,678 blocks
==3999938==      possibly lost: 576 bytes in 2 blocks
==3999938==    still reachable: 467,400 bytes in 3,543 blocks
==3999938==                       of which reachable via heuristic:
==3999938==                         multipleinheritance: 2,416 bytes in 1 blocks
==3999938==         suppressed: 0 bytes in 0 blocks
==3999938== Rerun with --leak-check=full to see details of leaked memory
==3999938== 
==3999938== For lists of detected and suppressed errors, rerun with: -s
==3999938== ERROR SUMMARY: 2 errors from 2 contexts (suppressed: 0 from 0)
```

This points at https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/0276e17b2e55ef4b574fdad8aed5d19c791344ef introducing the jump depending on uninitialized value.
